name: Savory Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Dried ancho chilies; OR 1 tbsp Ancho chili powder
8 cups Chicken stock (reduced-fat) OR Vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems and seeds from ancho chilies. Place chilies in a saucepan, cover with water, and cook until soft (about 10 minutes). Drain chilies and let cool.
2. Puree the cooked chilies in a food processor or blender.
3. In a large saucepan, saute two tortillas cut into small pieces until they are crispy in 2 teaspoons of canola oil.
4. Add ancho pepper puree (or chili powder), chicken stock (or vegetable stock), tomato puree, cumin, oregano, and salt to the saucepan. Bring soup to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Puree the soup in a food processor and return it to the saucepan. Stir in lime juice and reheat.
6. Slice remaining tortillas into 1/4-inch x 2-inch strips. Heat the oil in a medium skillet, then add the tortilla strips and saute until they are crisp (about 2 minutes). Drain on paper towel.
7. Serve soup in bowls topped with tortilla strips, cheese, avocado, sour cream, cilantro, or diced chicken if desired.
